svg.text: Best run AL-20260329-021 reached 1.3709 val_bpb. 29 scored runs are tracked here, with 10 kept and 19 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260329-025 (discard) tested the current `QK_GAIN_INIT=1.5` may be too conservative for the step-rich frontier, so a sharper `QK_GAIN_INIT=2.0` could help.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
